executives.name: Wahid Nawabi
executives.background: Mr. Nawabi has served as our Chairman of the Board since August 2021, as our President and Chief Executive Officer since May 2016, and as a director since May 2016. He joined AeroVironment in 2011 and previously served as Chief Operating Officer and Senior Vice President and General Manager of our Efficient Energy Systems business segment.

tenure_dates.title: Segment Manager and other leadership roles
